The health benefits of Jamaican dogwood include its ability to reduce anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative properties, as well as its potential to alleviate pain and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, including the lignans, jamaicensin and jamaicensinone.
